text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the cheers from here even 
though the race hasn't even started.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Or perhaps, do these cheering 
sounds stem from my memories? 
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha!! You could be right. My body… it's 
yearning to run. The passionate races that 
fondly linger in my memories, I want to 
experience them for myself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Shall we go, Trainer… To whatever 
future this world will bring us.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'll be going off to confirm it.
